name: Slip at work in Millcreek, government building—different rules?

mainEntity.name: Slip at work in Millcreek, government building—different rules?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, file notice within 1 year for public employer claims alongside comp.** Strict deadlines in Utah.[1] Key factors: (1) Governmental Immunity Act; (2) Comp still primary; (3) Waiver for negligence. Comply exactly. Attorney handles dual filing.
